prompt_rules: single SFC-style JRPG battle background with foreground, midground, background, and far-distance layers
leave clean actor lanes and enemy lanes with readable ground contact cues
no UI, no text, no characters, no enemies, and no command cursor

prompt:
Wide pixel-art parallax BACKGROUND for a bright mythical-Japan action RPG field: a luminous clear morning sky over a peaceful satoyama countryside horizon. Soft cumulus clouds, gentle distant green hills with terraced rice paddies, faint atmospheric haze near the horizon line. Bright, open, hopeful mood with rich saturated colors - spring sunlight. The horizon line sits in the lower third; the upper two thirds are sky and clouds. NO characters, NO buildings in the foreground, no text. Crisp high-resolution 16-bit-style pixel art, fine readable pixel clusters, painterly SNES-era sky gradients.
Avoid: no Mario/Nintendo/Zelda/Final Fantasy/Pokemon/Dragon Quest/Secret of Mana/Okami/Sakuna characters, logos or likeness, no samurai armor, no kabuto helmet, no ninja outfit, no two-sword daisho, no gun, no modern objects, no horror mood, no dark gloomy palette, no bird or companion creature in the sheet, no letter emblems, no modern text/watermark/UI.
